commits: 4eefe39 fix(codegen): SSBO struct member Offset 0 decoration (CRIT-7 Vulkan compliance)
d015b8e fix(hir): register params in symbol table; enable AssignToParam (CRIT-2)
ece6d1b fix(codegen): gid axis via OpCompositeExtract per spec (CRIT-5)
spirv_val_note: spirv-tools not installed (no sudo access). CRIT-7 fix is correct per Vulkan §15.6.4 spec — OpMemberDecorate struct 0 Offset 0 now emitted for every SSBO struct. AT-231 test validates the decoration is present structurally.

CRIT-7.description: Added OpMemberDecorate struct_type_id 0 Offset 0 after the Block decoration in emit_buffer_globals. Added AT-231 test cg_ssbo_struct_member_has_offset_zero that walks annotations and asserts Decoration::Offset 0 is present for the SSBO struct member 0.

CRIT-2.description: The Assign path in typecheck_kernel_body now checks tc.find_param() BEFORE tc.find_binding(). If the target name matches a kernel parameter, TypecheckError::AssignToParam fires immediately. tc_assign_to_param_rejected now asserts AssignToParam{name:'a'} with a strong matches! check.

CRIT-1.description: tc_multi_dim_index_rejected was testing band() success (unrelated to multi-dim indexing). The M1.2 grammar cannot produce Index(non-Ident) nodes (postfix indexing is Ident-only). TypecheckError::MultiDimIndexInM1_2 removed as dead code (CRIT-6 co-fix). Test renamed tc_band_builtin_ok with correct intent.

CRIT-3.description: tc_gid_axis_negative_rejected renamed tc_gid_axis_non_literal_rejected and now asserts GidAxisMustBeConstant (the actual variant fired for -1 parsed as Unary(Neg,IntLit(1))). Added separate test tc_gid_axis_three_out_of_range using gid(3u32) which fires GidAxisOutOfRange{got:3}.

CRIT-4.description: Tightened 3 weak assertions: tc_bad_index_type_float now asserts BadIndexType{got_ty:'f32'} specifically (no OR with TypeMismatch). tc_bad_index_type_bool now asserts BadIndexType{got_ty:'bool'}. tc_index_signed_integer_ok renamed tc_index_signed_integer_rejected and asserts BadIndexType{got_ty:'i32'}.

CRIT-5.description: emit_gid_component now emits OpLoad uvec3 from gid_var followed by OpCompositeExtract u32 with a LITERAL axis operand (per architect spec §scope_in_summary[11] and SPIR-V §3.32.13). Removed u32_ptr_type_id field from GlobalInvocationIdVar (no longer needed). Updated compile_gid_demo.rs docstring and added OpCompositeExtract count assertion (>=3 for gid_demo.axc).

CRIT-6.description: Removed TypecheckError::MultiDimIndexInM1_2 (dead — grammar cannot produce Index(non-Ident)) and TypecheckError::UnknownParam (never pushed anywhere). The Index fallthrough arm now emits UnsupportedExprInM1_1 as a forward-compatible safety net.

tests_removed: tc_multi_dim_index_rejected (replaced by tc_band_builtin_ok with correct intent)
